citation_short: Fiscalía sentence, Fredi Alonso Pulgarín Gaviria (2016)
title: Sentencia contra Fredi Alonso Pulgarín Gaviria
author_or_org: Fiscalía General de la Nación / Colombian judicial proceedings
strengths: Accessible judicial source reproducing army-based operational figures and later paramilitary-collaboration context.
limitations: The key death figure mixes civilians and militiamen, which blocks strict-status DR use.
notes: Primary official casualty source used here.

citation_short: Truth Commission article on Operation Orion
title: El violento engranaje de la Operación Orión
author_or_org: Comisión de la Verdad de Colombia
strengths: Clear framing of the initial 16-17 October window and the fact that violence continued in following months.
notes: Useful for bounding the episode and excluding later harms from the direct-death window.

citation_short: CNMH efemérides entry on Operation Orion
title: Efemérides CNMH - 16 y 17 de octubre de 2002
pages_or_sections: entry for 16 y 17 de octubre de 2002
strengths: Compact alternative source family with an explicitly civilian-centered casualty description.
limitations: Short commemorative entry, not a full evidentiary report.
notes: Useful for showing why the official and civilian-memory casualty systems do not reconcile cleanly.
